steps.message:
[SYSTEM]
You are a careful and methodical reasoner.
Each turn, you MUST respond with ONLY a JSON block in this exact format:
```json
{
  "analysis": "<your observations and reasoning this turn>",
  "plan": "<what you intend to examine or verify next>",
  "answers": null
}
```
When you have verified all answers and are fully confident, set `answers` to a list of strings (one letter per question, in question order), for example:
```json
{
  "analysis": "<final verification notes>",
  "plan": "done",
  "answers": ["B", "A", "C"]
}
```
Do NOT set `answers` until you have genuinely cross-checked every question. Take as many turns as you need.

[USER]
You are solving a set of orthographic projection questions.

Each question is presented as a single composite image in standard PAT format:
- Left panel:  top view, front view, and end view, separated by orthographic reference lines. One of them has been replaced by a question mark. 
- Right panel: four candidate views for the question mark labelled A, B, C, D,

Select the one view that is fully consistent with the two other views.

Respond each turn with a JSON block as instructed. When you are confident in all your answers, set the "answers" field to a list of letters (one per question, in order).

There are 15 question(s) in total. The composite question image(s) follow.

{
  "analysis": "Reviewed each orthographic set by matching visible/hidden edges and feature placement between the given two views and the candidate missing view.

q01: Frustum with circular top and centered square hidden feature plus small tab at bottom in top view -> D.
q02: From top/end, front must show rectangular body with both sloping hidden edges and centered vertical hidden pair under top post -> B.
q03: Front step profile plus top diagonal/partition gives end view with hidden horizontal line and visible upper-right recess -> C.
q04: Given front/end correspond to T-shaped plan with hidden pair centered and small right tab -> C.
q05: Top/front imply end view with base rectangle left and tall tapered face right, with two hidden verticals in left block -> C.
q06: Front/end show outer plan with bottom central notch, top-left notch, right recess, and visible internal rectangle but no circular hole -> C.
q07: Top is rectangle with through hole; end shows sloping profile, so front collapses to plain rectangle with two hidden vertical lines for cylindrical hole -> D.
q08: Top/front indicate stepped end profile only; candidate with correct L-shape and hidden pair near right side -> B.
q09: Matching top and front gives end with right-side visible upstand and hidden detail below, plus left hidden pair -> B.
q10: Front/end of tapered frustum with transverse bar and central rear opening; top must be square frustum outline with bar across and hidden dashed connection -> D.
q11: Circular plan with left hole visible, bottom tab visible, and two hidden internal verticals from front/end -> C.
q12: Front/end indicate circular outer plan with bottom slot, top circle overlapping left rectangle; hidden diagonal inside overlap -> B.
q13: Top/front require end view of block with central spike and small visible notch at base center, no side projection -> C.
q14: From top and end, front must show left low block visible, top central post, and hidden verticals, without diagonal visible in front -> C.
q15: Front/end show circular plan with central inner circle, vertical visible slot, dashed centerlines, top tab and small right rectangle -> B.

Cross-checked consistency of projection conventions and eliminated distractors with wrong visible/hidden status or mirrored feature placement.",
  "plan": "done",
  "answers": ["D", "B", "C", "C", "C", "C", "D", "B", "B", "D", "C", "B", "C", "C", "B"]
}
